package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_mutates_transport_dto_in_place: Services that rewrite handler DTOs instead of mapping to service-layer inputs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule174NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule174NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule174NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario174Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule174NegativeService, input Rule174NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
